Sign inRun your first job
Job orchestration your team can ship with

Run every background workflow from one clean control center. Launch faster, fix failures sooner, and stop stitching together queue tools.

Strait gives your team one place to trigger work, watch progress, and recover quickly when something goes wrong.

Start your first workflowRead quickstart →
No broker setup requiredWorks with your PostgreSQL stackBuilt for real production traffic

See how runs move through your system in real time. Track execution details, inspect failures, and decide the next action without leaving your operational workflow.

strait — run diagnostics

Order Processing Workflow

Step 1 validates incoming payload and checks idempotency before enqueueing work for downstream services.

Queueing and state transitions stay in PostgreSQL, so workers scale horizontally without duplicate claims.

If the dispatch fails, Strait schedules retries with jitter and routes exhausted attempts to dead letter for replay.

AI Assistant

Run is failing on attempt 2. What should we check?

Dispatch returned 503 from the endpoint. Retry strategy is exponential with jitter. Next retry is scheduled for 12:04:18Z.

Can we inspect full execution details?

Yes. Open the debug bundle for this run to review events, checkpoints, usage, and tool-call outputs before replaying.

Ask about this run...

Live run timeline

See where each run is right now without jumping between tools.

Smart retries

Failed steps retry automatically so your team spends less time firefighting.

Fast replay

Replay failed runs in seconds and keep delivery moving.

Too much firefighting, not enough shipping. When jobs live across disconnected tools, small failures turn into long incident nights.

1

You maintain one system for API logic, another for queueing, and another for scheduling.

2

Retries, dead letters, and timeouts behave differently across services and are hard to reason about.

3

Workflow dependencies and approvals become custom glue code that is brittle under load.

4

When a run fails, teams lose time stitching together logs, traces, and partial state.

Strait brings execution, visibility, and recovery into one place so your team can move with confidence.

Everything you need to keep background work moving. Strait brings setup, visibility, and recovery together so your team can deliver faster.

Postgres QueueWorkflow DAGsRetry StrategiesApproval GatesIdempotent TriggersDebug BundlesSDK EndpointsCost Budgets
Postgres QueueWorkflow DAGsRetry StrategiesApproval GatesIdempotent TriggersDebug BundlesSDK EndpointsCost Budgets

Why engineering teams use Strait. Build reliable async systems with less platform overhead and better operational control.

Why did this run move to dead letter?

Attempt 3 returned 502 and max attempts was reached. Replay is available with the same payload and metadata.

Run intelligence where work happens

Inspect failures, retries, and terminal states with context-rich events tied to every execution.

workflow.yaml

Configuration that stays operational

Define jobs and workflow behavior in one place, then execute with predictable semantics at scale.

Webhook Pipeline

Billing Jobs

Projects organized for operations

Environments, groups, and state labels keep asynchronous systems understandable as they grow.

Launch dependable job execution without platform overhead. Get a stable foundation for background work so your team can ship faster with fewer production surprises.

Set up your first workflow→
AI

What's the purpose of your content? Are you trying to inform, persuade, or entertain?

Who is your target audience?

I'm writing a blog post for SaaS founders about scaling content marketing...

You
AI

3 draft angles generated

Hook-First

Open with a bold stat that grabs attention immediately.

Story-Led

Start with a founder's journey to illustrate the problem.

Data-Driven

Lead with research and benchmarks to build credibility.

Make the intro more conversational and add a stronger hook.

AI

Here's the revised intro:

"What if I told you that 73% of SaaS companies waste their content budget on posts nobody reads?"

Choose a content type

"Let's talk about a strategy that actually works — no fluff, just results."

Scaling Content Marketing in 2025

The landscape of content marketing has shifted dramatically. Here's what SaaS founders need to know about building a sustainable content engine that drives real growth.

Twitter thread

1/373/280

We grew our content traffic 340% in 6 months. Here's the playbook:

2/394/280

Step 1: Stop writing for search engines. Start writing for humans who have specific problems.

3/378/280

Step 2: Use AI interviews to uncover angles you'd never think of on your own.

Replace tool sprawl with one platform your team actually enjoys. Strait helps you ship faster and recover quicker without building more internal plumbing.

Fragmented stack

  • Run a separate message broker and keep it healthy
  • Write custom retry, timeout, and deduplication logic
  • Build ad-hoc workflow dependency handling
  • Patch observability across multiple systems
  • Debug failures by joining logs from different tools
  • Repeat the same platform work in every project

Strait runtime

  • Queue runs directly in PostgreSQL with SKIP LOCKED
  • Use built-in retries, DLQ, and idempotency controls
  • Model DAG workflows with dependencies and conditions
  • Add approval gates and nested sub-workflows
  • Track runs with events, usage, and execution traces
  • Operate one runtime with API, worker, and CLI support
See Strait in action

Pricing that scales with your team. Start simple today, then unlock more power as your workflows grow.

Cancel anytimeKeep your existing PostgreSQL setupUpgrade as your workload grows

Starter

For teams getting their first production workflows live

$24/mo billed yearly
  • Postgres-backed queue
  • Job retries and timeout policies
  • Basic workflow orchestration
  • API + CLI access
  • Email support
Start with Starter
Most popular

Pro

For teams running mission-critical operations every day

$40/mo billed yearly
  • Advanced DAG orchestration
  • Approval gates and sub-workflows
  • Run usage and cost budgets
  • Debug bundles and replay controls
  • Priority support
Go Pro

STRAIT

From idea to completed run in a few clear steps Set up your flow once, then let your team launch, monitor, and recover work from one dashboard.

Job definition

Set up your workflow

Define what should run, when it should run, and how failures should be handled before they become incidents.

Trigger workflow run

Workflow is running. Step 1 completed. Waiting for approval gate on step 2.

Launch work with confidence

Trigger runs from your app or CLI and let Strait move each step forward in the right order.

Run operations
Events

Replay
Healthy

Fix issues fast

See exactly what happened, replay failed runs, and get work back on track without rebuilding your pipeline.

Create your first workflow

Built for teams that need dependable execution every day. Whether you run product workflows, platform jobs, or agent flows, Strait keeps operations simple.
